servinfo.title: Precautions for Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit (If Equipped)

attention1.ptxt: The Flat tire repair sealant in the Emergency Tire Repair Kit is harmful to your health.
Be sure to observe the following precautions to prevent your health from being ruined.

item.ptxt: Should you swallow the sealant, get medical attention immediately.
Keep the sealant out of reach of children.
Select a place with good ventilation for handling the sealant.
If the sealant contacts your eye or skin, wash the affected part thoroughly with water and receive medical attention immediately in the event of eye contact.
Do not discard tire containing flat tire repair sealant as it is. Make sure that flat tire repair sealant is removed from tire.
Dispose of flat tire repair sealant and waste cloth soiled with flat tire repair sealant as an industrial waste like waste oil.

attention4.ptxt: When you replace tire repaired using flat tire repair sealant, be sure to observe the following precautions, otherwise it may cause air leaks in tire.
When you service tire repaired using flat tire repair sealant, always observe the following precautions:

item.ptxt: Remove flat tire repair sealant from tire and wheel then replace the repaired tire with a tire.
Always replace bulb core with a new one.
Expiration date of flat tire repair sealant is printed on the container label. If it expires, replace flat tire repair sealant with a new one to ensure emergency flat tire repair.
